title: Sablayan Heat Wave
lead: Sablayan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.60. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current temperature in Sablayan has led to a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.6 GG, resulting in increased energy demand.
 The relative humidity is at 75%, which can exacerbate the perceived heat. The wind speed is 16.3 km/h, offering little relief.
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, emphasizing the need for caution and hydration.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
